title: AeroFrame-DT Synthetic Software Verification Report

sections.title: Scope
sections.body_markdown: This generated report demonstrates deterministic report production using synthetic inputs only.

sections.title: Verification
sections.body_markdown: The unit-test suite, traceability audit, release audit, and CLI smoke tests are the governing software evidence.

limitations: No OEM geometry or loads are included.
No licensed solver result is represented as completed.
No certification or airworthiness claim is made.
